channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Israel says it has killed Ali Larijani, Iran’s top security official
item.description: Israel’s Defence Minister Katz has claimed that Iran’s security chief has been assassinated

item.title: Gulf economies suffer brunt of Iran war as recession risk looms
item.description: From energy exports to tourism, the economies of Gulf nations are at risk from a prolonged conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: Why the Iranian regime did not collapse after Khamenei’s assassination
item.description: The Iranian regime is designed to survive power vacuums. That, however, does not mean it will survive the war unscathed.

item.title: Israel claims to have assassinated commander of Iran’s Basij militia unit
item.description: If confirmed, Soleimani would be highest level assassination in war since US-Israeli killed Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Families search for loved ones after deadly Pakistan strikes on Kabul rehab
item.description: Afghan authorities say a Pakistani attack has killed hundreds of civilians; Islamabad rejects the claim as 'false'.

item.title: Iran is targeting ships in response to US attacks — can the US stop them?
item.description: As the US-Israeli war against Iran continues, we look at a scenario reminiscent of the tanker war of the 1980s

item.title: Israeli attacks hit Beirut, southern Lebanon, one million displaced
item.description: Attacks hit three southern Beirut neighbourhoods, fighting in the south intensifies as Hezbollah engages Israeli army.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 18 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: The US-Israeli attacks target Iranian cities as the conflict spreads to the region and causes a global energy crisis.

item.title: Drone sparks fire at UAE oil site as Gulf takes more hits amid Iran war
item.description: The Fujairah oil hub has been hit repeatedly by Iranian drones as the US-Israeli war continues to ignite instability.

item.title: Inside Qeshm, Iran’s underground missile fortress and geological marvel
item.description: From the Valley of Stars to underground missiles, Qeshm Island is strategic ground zero for the US-Israel war on Iran.
